outreach_subject: 38 years of Lone Star Family Dentistry — a conversation about what comes next
outreach_body: Dr. Harmon, nearly four decades of serving Houston families is a remarkable legacy — and it raises a question worth asking before anyone else does: have you started thinking about what the next chapter looks like for you and your practice? I work with dentists at exactly this stage, helping them transition on their own terms rather than scrambling when the time comes. I'd love to share what that process can look like — no pressure, just a conversation.
